word: H7163 - קֶרֶן הַפּוּךְ - qeren hap-pûwk - keh'-ren hap-pook' - Keren-happuch

sections.paragraph:
Original: קרן הפּוּך

Transliteration: qeren happûk

Phonetic: keh'-ren hap-pook'

BDB Definition:

Keren-happuch = "horn of antimony"
  1. one of the daughters of Job born after his trial

Origin: from H7161 and H6320

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
